title: LOUISIANA PHARMACY PRACTICE ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 14.  LOUISIANA PHARMACY PRACTICE ACT

PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§1161.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known as the "Louisiana Pharmacy Practice Act".

Acts 1999, No. 767, §1.
